heroHeadline: Medical Aesthetics for Dearborn Women Who Want to *Look Their Best*
heroSub: Botox · Morpheus8 · HALO Laser · IV Therapy · Medical Weight Loss — Under Physician Direction in Dearborn, MI
tagline: Elite medical aesthetics under physician direction. Serving Dearborn, Dearborn Heights, Southfield, and Metro Detroit.
about: Adorn Medical Spa is an elite aesthetic medical practice co-founded by Dr. Fouad Dakhlallah and Nurse Practitioner Liz Karaali. With a shared belief that every patient deserves medical-grade care in a welcoming atmosphere, Adorn brings together the precision of medicine and the artistry of aesthetics. Serving Dearborn and the greater Metro Detroit community since our founding, we specialize in premium treatments using the most advanced FDA-cleared technology available — HALO Laser by Sciton, Morpheus8 RF microneedling, invisa-RED weight loss therapy, and more. Our practice is built on trust: every treatment is personalized, every result is earned.

providers.name: Dr. Fouad Dakhlallah
providers.title: Medical Director & Co-Founder
providers.bio: Dr. Dakhlallah brings extensive medical expertise to Adorn as our Medical Director and Co-Founder. His commitment to patient safety and evidence-based treatments ensures that every procedure at Adorn meets the highest standard of care.

providers.name: Liz Karaali
providers.title: Co-Founder & Lead Injector
providers.credentials: NP · Nurse Practitioner · Certified Aesthetic Injector
providers.bio: NP Liz Karaali is a skilled aesthetic injector and co-founder of Adorn. With an eye for natural, elegant results, Liz specializes in injectables, skincare, and comprehensive treatment planning — ensuring each patient leaves feeling their most confident.

services.name: Botox & Dysport
services.description: Smooth fine lines and dynamic wrinkles with precision neurotoxin injections. Natural results that refresh without freezing.

services.name: Dermal Fillers
services.description: Restore volume, define contours, and soften deep lines with hyaluronic acid fillers tailored to your anatomy.

services.name: Morpheus8 RF Microneedling
services.description: Fractional radiofrequency microneedling that remodels collagen deep in the dermis — tighter skin, refined texture, lifted contours.

services.name: HALO Laser by Sciton
services.description: The world's first hybrid fractional laser. Addresses pigmentation, fine lines, texture, and tone in a single treatment session.

services.name: Clarity II Laser Hair Removal
services.description: Fast, effective permanent hair reduction for all skin types. Safe for face, body, and sensitive areas.

services.name: invisa-RED Medical Weight Loss
services.description: FDA-cleared laser technology that targets fat cells and boosts metabolism — a clinical, non-surgical path to sustainable weight loss.

services.name: IV Infusion Therapy
services.description: Custom IV drips for hydration, energy, immunity, and recovery. Formulated by our medical team and administered on-site.

services.name: Medical-Grade Facials
services.description: Customized clinical facials combining chemical exfoliation, extractions, and active ingredients for real, visible skin improvement.

services.name: Rosacea Treatment
services.description: Targeted laser and topical protocols to reduce redness, calm flare-ups, and improve the appearance of rosacea long-term.

beforeAfterGallery.treatment: HALO Laser Resurfacing — Real Patient Result

gallery.alt: Happy client with NP Liz at Adorn Medical Spa

reviews.name: Samantha R.
reviews.text: I've been coming to Adorn for two years. Dr. Dakhlallah is meticulous and takes his time explaining everything. My Morpheus8 results were honestly shocking — in the best way. My skin looks 10 years younger.

reviews.name: Nadia K.
reviews.text: Liz is an artist with filler. I was nervous about looking overdone — she listened to exactly what I wanted and the result looks completely natural. My family didn't even realize I'd had anything done.

reviews.name: Fatima A.
reviews.text: The HALO laser cleared up sun damage I've had for years. The team is professional, the space is beautiful, and they make you feel like a priority from the moment you walk in. I won't go anywhere else.

tagline: Birmingham's only practice combining licensed medical aesthetics with certified holistic healing � all under one roof, all from one practitioner.
about: SeLa Medical & Holistic Spa is founded and operated by Seya Murray � Licensed Massage Therapist, Licensed Aesthetician, Certified Herbalist, Reiki Practitioner, and Sound & Vibration Practitioner. Seya comes from a family of holistic healers and brings that generational depth to a fully clinical practice. At SeLa, you can book Botox and a sound bath in the same visit. Medical weight loss with Semaglutide and Tirzepatide alongside herbal wellness consultations. Microneedling and IV therapy under the same certified hands. This is Birmingham aesthetics, redefined.

providers.name: Seya Murray
providers.title: Founder & Lead Practitioner
providers.credentials: LMT � Licensed Aesthetician � Certified Herbalist � Reiki Practitioner � Sound & Vibration Practitioner
providers.bio: Seya Murray built SeLa on a rare foundation: the clinical precision of a licensed medical aesthetician combined with the healing depth of a certified herbalist and energy practitioner. Trained across five disciplines, she offers a whole-body approach to aesthetics that no corporate med spa can match. Every treatment at SeLa is designed by Seya, performed by Seya, and tailored to you.

services.name: Medical Weight Loss
services.description: Compounded Tirzepatide and Semaglutide peptide protocols with personalized monitoring, nutritional guidance, and ongoing support for sustainable results.

services.name: IV Therapy
services.description: Custom intravenous infusions for hydration, energy, immunity, and recovery. Pairs naturally with any holistic or clinical treatment.

services.name: Vitamin Injections
services.description: Quick-hit injections: B12, B-Complex, Lipo/MIC, Mega Vitamin C, Immune Boost, and Glutathione. Standalone or add-on to any visit.

announceBar: Now accepting new clients in Novi · 4.9★ Google · 122 Reviews · PA-C Led · Book your consultation today
heroHeadline: Novi's Top-Rated Aesthetic Practice — *Real Results. Real Credentials.*
heroSub: Botox · Daxxify · Dermal Fillers · UltraClear Laser · PRF — Under PA-C Direction in Novi, MI
tagline: Personalized aesthetic medicine for Novi. Every treatment is a prescription — designed for your face, your goals, your results.
about: Aesthetic RX is a PA-C-led aesthetic practice in Novi, Michigan built around one principle: your face is not a template. Lead injector Alison (PA-C) founded Aesthetic RX on a full-face balancing philosophy — treating the face as a whole rather than chasing individual lines or features. The result is natural, cohesive outcomes that enhance rather than alter. With a team of specialized injectors and estheticians and a verified 4.9-star Google rating across 122 reviews, Aesthetic RX has become one of Novi's most trusted aesthetic practices.

providers.name: Alison
providers.title: Founder & Lead Injector
providers.bio: Alison founded Aesthetic RX on a full-face balancing philosophy. As a PA-C with advanced aesthetic training, she approaches every patient with the goal of natural enhancement — results that colleagues and family notice, but can't quite place. Her work has earned Aesthetic RX a verified 4.9-star Google rating.

providers.name: Jenna
providers.title: Injector
providers.bio: Jenna brings precision and artistry to the Aesthetic RX injection suite. She documents real treatment results on the practice's Instagram — including her own UltraClear 3D MIRACL skin transformation.

providers.name: Jennie
providers.title: Esthetician & Skincare Specialist
providers.bio: Jennie curates the skincare experience at Aesthetic RX with intentional, science-backed product selection. Her morning skincare routine and treatment philosophy are featured regularly on the practice's social channels.

providers.name: Ivana
providers.title: Provider
providers.bio: Ivana is part of the Aesthetic RX team, delivering personalized treatments aligned with the practice's commitment to natural, results-driven aesthetics.

services.name: Botox, Dysport & Daxxify
services.description: Precision wrinkle relaxers for natural, refreshed results without the frozen look. Daxxify offers extended longevity — up to 6 months per treatment.

services.name: Dermal Fillers
services.description: Hyaluronic acid filler for volume restoration, lip enhancement, and facial contouring — administered with a full-face balancing approach.

services.name: Bio-Stimulators
services.description: Radiesse, Sculptra, and similar collagen-stimulating injectables for long-lasting structural improvement and skin quality enhancement.

services.name: PRF & EZgel
services.description: Platelet Rich Fibrin therapy using your own growth factors for natural regeneration — skin quality, under-eyes, hair restoration, and fine line improvement.

services.name: Sylfirm-X RF Microneedling
services.description: The only FDA-cleared device treating both stable and unstable melanin — addresses rosacea, hyperpigmentation, laxity, and texture in one platform.

services.name: UltraClear 3D MIRACL Laser
services.description: Next-generation skin renewal laser. Real results documented on our own team. Safe for all skin types — minimal downtime.

services.name: Aerolase Laser
services.description: Ultra-gentle laser treatment for acne, rosacea, pigmentation, and vascular concerns — tolerated by even the most sensitive skin.

services.name: Glass Facial
services.description: Aesthetic RX's signature facial — deep hydration, gentle exfoliation, and medical-grade actives for a luminous glass-skin glow in one session.

services.name: Chemical Peels & Facials
services.description: Medical-grade peels and customized facials using Toskani skincare line for real, visible skin improvement.
